title: Infosys Launches Topaz Fabric AI Stack for Enterprise IT Services
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the launch of Infosys Topaz Fabric on November 3, 2025. The offering is described as a layered, composable, open and interoperable stack of data infrastructure, models, agents, flows, and AI apps intended to unify and accelerate enterprise IT service delivery. It covers IT operations, transformation services, quality engineering services, and cybersecurity services, and includes 50+ purpose-built IT operations agents with out-of-the-box integration with 9 enterprise platforms. Infosys said the platform is designed to build on existing IT investments, avoid vendor lock-ins, and accelerate value realization from enterprise AI transformation programs.
